case_title: KENNETH B MAYBURY MD VS. LOREN CLIFFORD STOLLE MD

DECLARATION OF KENNETH B. MAYBURY RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAYBURY MD, KENNETH B
COPYING FEES (6 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF MAYBURY MD, KENNETH B

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-09-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-09-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF KENNETH B. MAYBURY, M.D. REPRESENTED BY VALERIE CRAWFORD, BUSINESS MANAGER AND SPOUSE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LOREN CLIFFORD STOLLE IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-29-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUN-17-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $3,750.00 FILED BY STOLLE MD, LOREN CLIFFORD AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT MAYBURY MD, KENNETH B ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-09-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-09-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-09-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT KENNETH B. MAYBURY, M.D. REPRESENTED BY VALERIE CRAWFORD, BUSINESS MANAGER AND SPOUSE IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT LOREN CLIFFORD STOLLE IS PRESENT .BOTH PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT AND DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAYBURY MD, KENNETH B RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STOLLE MD, LOREN CLIFFORD $2,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,365.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-09-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT STOLLE MD, LOREN CLIFFORD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT MAYBURY MD, KENNETH B STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
